report.summary: Quiet cycle — zero commits since Mar 17 (Day 64); 412 published slugs with 309 page.tsx present; 3 carry-over engineering items unchanged; defi-yields fallback still the only critical gap.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 412 published slugs parsed, 309 have page.tsx files, 103 are pre-scaffolded future pages (unchanged from last cycle)
Publish queue: EMPTY — all planned pages promoted to production
No new commits since e999560 (Mar 17, Day 64) — zero regression risk this cycle
Known JSX issue persists: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx has unescaped > in string literals; low severity due to ignoreBuildErrors:true
Live HTTP verification blocked by sandbox egress — cannot confirm 200s directly
No new code introduced — no new test failures possible

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko markets, 60s TTL, in-memory cache + stale fallback ✓, X-Cache-Source header ✓
/api/trending — CoinGecko trending, 300s TTL, in-memory cache + stale-on-catch fallback ✓, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, in-memory cache + stale-on-catch fallback ✓, MISSING X-Cache-Source header
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + fear-greed, 60s TTL, in-memory cache ✓, uses X-Cache instead of X-Cache-Source (inconsistent)
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s TTL, in-memory cache + FALLBACK_DATA constant ✓, X-Cache-Source ✓ (best pattern)
CRITICAL: /api/defi-yields — DefiLlama, 300s cache headers only, NO in-memory cache, NO fallback data — returns 500 on upstream failure

sections.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
items: Latest deploy: commit e999560 (Day 64 publish, Mar 17) — 5 days idle, no new deploys
next.config: standalone output, trailingSlash, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false — stable
Middleware: Edge-compatible, 50 PILLAR_PAGES inlined, security headers present (X-DNS-Prefetch, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy)
Static assets: Cache-Control immutable 1yr max-age on _next/static — correct
Image optimization: AVIF + WebP, 24hr minimum cache TTL — correct
Cannot verify live Vercel status from sandbox — no egress access

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing — site idle since Day 64 publish (Mar 17)
Publish queue: EMPTY — next pages require new content scaffolding
Carry-over (critical): Add fallback data + in-memory cache to /api/defi-yields — only route that 500s on upstream failure
Carry-over (medium): Add X-Cache-Source headers to /api/trending and /api/fear-greed
Carry-over (medium): Rename X-Cache to X-Cache-Source in /api/market-metrics for consistency
Carry-over (low): Fix JSX unescaped > in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx
103 published slugs still lack page.tsx — these are future content placeholders, not regressions
No blockers requiring Jefe's attention — site is stable but idle
